scripts.cf:deploy: npm run cf:build && wrangler deploy --config apps/astro/dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.cf:deploy:prod: npm run cf:build && wrangler deploy --config apps/astro/dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.cf:deploy:preview: npm run cf:build && wrangler deploy --config apps/astro/dist/server/wrangler.json --env preview
scripts.seed: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:load-local
scripts.pipeline:ingest: npm run pipeline:normalize && npm run pipeline:cache-assets && npm run pipeline:extract && npm run pipeline:enrich && npm run seed
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply movies-that-feel-like --local --config apps/astro/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:load-local: npm run load -w apps/pipeline -- --reset --sql-out data/working/load-d1.sql && npm run d1:apply
scripts.d1:apply: sh -c 'set -eu; wrangler d1 execute movies-that-feel-like --local --command "PRAGMA foreign_keys=OFF; DELETE FROM recommendation_evidence; DELETE FROM vibe_tags; DELETE FROM imported_post_images; DELETE FROM recommendations; DELETE FROM imported_vibe_posts;" --config apps/astro/wrangler.jsonc; chunk_dir="$(pwd)/data/working/load-d1"; for chunk in "$chunk_dir"/*.sql; do [ -f "$chunk" ] || continue; wrangler d1 execute movies-that-feel-like --local --file "$chunk" --config apps/astro/wrangler.jsonc; done'
